message:
test: add unit tests for products module (collapse_whitespace, hex UID, product UID)

- 23 tests covering pure functions: collapse_whitespace (6 tests),
  is_hex_uid (10 tests), generate_product_uid (6 tests), worktrees_required (1 test)
